feature.name: Filename and filepath sanitization core
feature.description: Extract cross-platform filename and filepath sanitization with platform-specific reserved names, validation errors, and sanitize/validate helpers without importing pathvalidate.
included_behaviors: Windows reserved device names (CON, PRN, etc.) rejected or rewritten
ValidationError exposes ErrorReason and reserved_name metadata
excluded_behaviors: LTSV label and symbol replacement helpers

entanglement.description: Sanitization couples platform detection, reserved-name tables, per-segment filename rules, path normalization, and typed validation error metadata across _base, _common, _filename, and _filepath.
signals: Platform enum drives Windows vs POSIX invalid char sets
ReservedNameHandler rewrites CON/PRN after regex sanitize
FilePathSanitizer delegates each segment to FileNameSanitizer
ValidationError carries ErrorReason codes and reserved_name

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Platform, sanitize_filename, sanitize_filepath, validate_filename, validate_filepath, is_valid_filename, is_valid_filepath, ValidationError, ErrorReason, ReservedNameError, InvalidCharError
